title: ChooseDeath
description: A plugin that lets your players choose the difficulty of their deaths
body:
# ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2abfedd0e9575ecae3e0821fe5a56eb628e86ec.png) Choose Death

This plugin allows player to choose of more or less difficult death. Great for SMPs with a mix of new and veteran players !

### Death Difficulties
- **PEACEFUL:** 
  - Keep items and experience points
  - Respawn at last respawn point
- **EASY:**
  - Creates a private grave at death location
  - Respawn at last respawn point
  - _**Note: If the server is in Peaceful mode, grave won't spawn, and you will lose all your items**_
- **NORMAL:**
  - Normal Minecraft death
- **HARD:**
  - Lose items and experience points
  - Respawn at last respawn point
- **HARDCORE:**
  - Lose items and experience points
  - Respawn at world spawn

### Commands
- `/choosedeath reload` : Reloads plugin
    - _permission : `choosedeath.commands.reload`_
- `/choosedeath open` : Opens up the menu to change your death difficulty
  - _permission : `choosedeath.commands.open`_
- `/choosedeath set <DeathDifficulty> [<Player>]` : Change your death difficulty
  - _permission : `choosedeath.commands.set`_
  - _permission : `choosedeath.commands.set.target` for setting other players difficulty_
- `/choosedeath setitem <DeathDifficulty>` : Change the menu item for a set difficulty
  - _permission : `choosedeath.commands.setitem`_

### Disclaimer
This is my first ever released plugin. It's real bare bones for now but I plan on adding stuff in the future.
Also, the code is open source so feel free to take a look and propose changes !


### Screenshot

![screenshot](https://codeberg.org/ImNootingHere/ChooseDeath/raw/branch/2.0/src/main/resources/screenshot.png)
